title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Pair headset with charge case
scenario: Verify Poly Studio Mobile app and Poly Cloud web page correctly display headset and charge case battery levels and device info after power cycling Voyager Legend 50
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired smartphone.
2. Ensure the Poly Voyager Legend 50 (Flamingo) headset is powered on and connected to the app.
3. Turn off the headset by pressing and holding the Power button until the LED turns off.
4. Place the headset into the charge case.
5. Remove the headset from the charge case.
6. Power on the headset by pressing and holding the Power button until the LED indicates power on.
7. Observe the battery level indicators in the Poly Studio Mobile app (Home screen or Device Settings screen) for both the headset and the charge case.
8. Log in to the Poly Cloud web portal (https://cloud.poly.com).
9. Navigate to the Devices section and locate the paired Voyager Legend 50 device.
10. Verify the device is identified as "Voyager Legend 50 UC".
11. Click on the device to view detailed device information.
12. In the Components section, verify there are separate entries for the earpiece (headset) and the charge case.
expected: Poly Studio Mobile app displays correct battery levels for both the headset and charge case. Poly Cloud web page identifies the device as "Voyager Legend 50 UC" and shows detailed device information with separate entries for earpiece and charge case in the Components section.
